advancements.neosync.cross_dim_sync.desc: Sync into a shell resting in a different dimension.
advancements.neosync.first_sync.descript: Transfer your consciousness into a shell for the first time.
advancements.neosync.first_sync.title: Out of Body Experience
advancements.neosync.place_constructor.d: Place a Shell Constructor. The lab is open.
advancements.neosync.place_storage.descr: Place a Shell Storage. A vacant body awaits.
advancements.neosync.place_storage.title: Soul Cage
advancements.neosync.root.description: Obtain a Sync Core and begin your journey into serial immortality.
advancements.neosync.root.title: One Mind, Many Bodies
command.neosync.ghostshells.failed: %s's shell cannot be repaired at %s. There's no shell container at the given coords
command.neosync.ghostshells.invalid_acti: Available actions are: sync, remove and repair
command.neosync.ghostshells.not_found: %s has no information about the shell that should be located at %s
command.neosync.ghostshells.removed: Successfully removed shell (%2$s) from %1$s's radial menu
death.attack.neosync.fingerstick: %s died in the name of science
event.neosync.any.fail.undead: This operation cannot be performed by an undead player
event.neosync.construction.fail.health: You don't have enough health to perform this operation
event.neosync.construction.fail.occupied: This shell container is already occupied
event.neosync.request.fail.invalid.locat: The sync process cannot be started at the current location
The selected shell cannot be found
event.neosync.request.fail.invalid.shell: The selected shell is not owned by the current player
gui.neosync.default.cross_button.title: Close
gui.neosync.shell_selector.down.title: Next world
gui.neosync.shell_selector.left.title: Previous page
gui.neosync.shell_selector.right.title: Next page
gui.neosync.shell_selector.title: Shell Selector
gui.neosync.shell_selector.up.title: Previous world
jei.neosync.info.shell_constructor: Place the Shell Constructor, supply it with energy via a Treadmill (or any FE source), then right-click it to begin constructing a new shell from your genetic sample. Warning: the sampling process deals damage.
jei.neosync.info.shell_storage: Place a Shell Storage and supply it with redstone power (or FE). Walk into it when the doors are open to pull up the radial shell menu and transfer your mind into a stored shell.
jei.neosync.info.sync_core: The Sync Core is the key component in every shell-related block. Combine it with gray concrete to craft a Shell Constructor or a Shell Storage.
jei.neosync.info.treadmill: Two-block structure. Lure a pig, wolf, or other supported animal onto the front block and it will generate energy that neighbouring Shell Constructors / Storages will consume.
